issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct) but the condition logic is incomplete. Missing check for 'this Character was played on this turn'.

Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. Text says 'negate the effect' of opponent's Leader, which requires a negation mechanic, not Rest. No standard action maps to effect negation; this may need a custom action or clarification.

Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. Text says 'negate the effect' AND 'that Character cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next turn'. Rest alone does not capture both negation + attack prevention with duration through opponent's next turn.
Condition only checks Leader type but misses the temporal constraint 'this Character was played on this turn'. Needs additional condition or timestamp validation.
Second action requires duration 'UntilEndOfOpponentNextTurn' (opponent's next turn end), not a simple state change. Current DSL omits duration specification.

suggestedDsl.note: Effect negation is not a standard OPTCG DSL action. Recommend clarifying with official card database whether this uses a custom 'NegateEffect' action or if mechanics should be represented differently. Below shows structure assuming custom negation action exists:
